ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon rating of the vehicle */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in cubic inches */,
  "horsepower" REAL /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the vehicle */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the vehicle */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine type used in the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "drive_system" TEXT /* Drive system (e.g., front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "emissions_rating" REAL /* Emissions rating of the vehicle */,
  "safety_rating" REAL /* Safety rating of the vehicle */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors in the vehicle */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV, truck) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_engine_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_type_id") REFERENCES engine_types ("engine_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the manufacturer's logo */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the manufacturer */,
  "annual_production" INTEGER /* Annual production capacity of the manufacturer */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share percentage of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine type (e.g., V6, V8) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine type */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Average fuel efficiency of the engine type */,
  "emissions" REAL /* Average emissions of the engine type */,
  "max_power" REAL /* Maximum power output of the engine type */,
  "max_torque" REAL /* Maximum torque output of the engine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the metrics */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon rating */,
  "horsepower" REAL /* Horsepower rating */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 mph to 0 mph */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption rate (e.g., liters per 100 km) */,
  "emissions" REAL /* Emissions rating of the vehicle */,
  "safety_rating" REAL /* Safety rating of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the vehicle (1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the vehicle */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Whether the review is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_engines" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine type used in the vehicle */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the engine was installed in the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "engine_type_id")
)
